signals.headline: US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Takes Effect | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US-Iran Two-Week Ceasefire Takes Effect | YES | HIGH confidence**

A temporary two-week ceasefire between the United States and Iran went into effect in full coordination with Israel[2]. President Trump had set an 8 p.m. deadline for Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz unconditionally, threatening complete demolition of Iranian infrastructure if demands weren't met[3]. Putin Claims Control of Ukrainian Cities Without Evidence | NO | HIGH confidence**

Russian President Vladimir Putin claimed Russian forces captured Pokrovsk and Vovchansk, but Ukraine denies these claims[5]. signals.headline: Russia Warns of Nuclear Proliferation in Middle East | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia Warns of Nuclear Proliferation in Middle East | YES | MED confidence**

Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov warned that Western actions are pushing Middle Eastern nations toward acquiring nuclear weapons, describing the situation as "World War Three in a new form"[6].
